articles.title: $8M Lost as THORChain Suffers Third Attack in a Month
articles.description: THORChain has experienced its third security breach in just a month, resulting in an $8 million loss. The repeated attacks have raised concerns about the platform's vulnerabilities and its ability to secure users' funds, highlighting ongoing challenges in the decentralized finance sector.
